org.arakhne.afc.ui.android.filechooser

Class FileChooserActivity

  • java.lang.Object
    • android.content.Context
      • android.content.ContextWrapper
        • android.view.ContextThemeWrapper
          • android.app.Activity
            • android.support.v4.app.FragmentActivity
              • org.arakhne.afc.ui.android.filechooser.FileChooserActivity
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    android.content.ComponentCallbacks, android.content.ComponentCallbacks2, android.support.v4.app.FragmentManager.OnBackStackChangedListener, android.view.KeyEvent.Callback, android.view.LayoutInflater.Factory, android.view.LayoutInflater.Factory2, android.view.View.OnCreateContextMenuListener, android.view.Window.Callback

    public class FileChooserActivity
extends android.support.v4.app.FragmentActivity
implements android.support.v4.app.FragmentManager.OnBackStackChangedListener
    File chooser embedded inside an activity fragment.
    Version:
    $Name$ $Revision$ $Date$

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      (package private) static String ACTIVITY_OPTIONS
      Name of the extra data that is containing the options of the file chooser.
      static String SAVED_FILE_FILTER
      Name of the attribute that permits to save the file filter in the activity.
      static String SAVED_ICON_SELECTOR
      Name of the attribute that permits to save the icon selector in the activity.
      static String SAVED_IS_OPEN
      Name of the attribute that permits to indicates if the chooser is for opening a file.
      static String SAVED_PATH_NAME
      Name of the attribute that permits to save the path in the activity.
